title: Outdoor and Indoor Heat-Related Hazards National Emphasis Program (CPL 03-00-024)
citation: OSHA (renewed 2026-04-10). CPL 03-00-024-0. Signed by AssistSec David L. Keeling.
note: Cancels the 2022 directive. Heat priority day = NWS Heat Index ≥80 °F. 55 NAICS in App A. App I = inspector checklist; App J = citation guidance referencing the OSHA-NIOSH Heat App and worker acclimatization status.
